name: Superstate Short Duration US Government Securities Fund
fullName: Superstate Short Duration US Government Securities Fund
description: USTB is a tokenized private fund from Superstate that gives Qualified Purchasers access to short-duration U.S. Treasury Bills. Shares are represented by USTB tokens on Ethereum, Solana, and Plume, or held in book-entry form. The fund targets current income consistent with liquidity and stability of principal, with returns intended to align with the federal funds rate. Purchases and redemptions are facilitated through USD or USDC, with liquidity each market day.
subcategory: Tokenized short-duration U.S. Treasury bill fund
